content.description: Monitors inbound TCP connections to both WAP VIPs — site-a (0.0.0.0) and site-b (0.0.0.0) — via Cisco ASA firewall logs. All legitimate traffic should originate from Akamai CDN edge nodes. Non-Akamai connections indicate potential bypass of CDN and should be investigated immediately.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>ADFS: WAP Inbound Connection Monitor</label>
    <description>Monitors inbound TCP connections to both WAP VIPs — site-a (0.0.0.0) and site-b (0.0.0.0) — via Cisco ASA firewall logs. All legitimate traffic should originate from Akamai CDN edge nodes. Non-Akamai connections indicate potential bypass of CDN and should be investigated immediately.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[
{
	"title": "ADFS: WAP Inbound Connection Monitor",
	"description": "Monitors inbound TCP connections to both WAP VIPs — site-a (0.0.0.0) and site-b (0.0.0.0) — via Cisco ASA firewall logs. All legitimate traffic should originate from Akamai CDN edge nodes. Non-Akamai connections indicate potential bypass of CDN and should be investigated immediately.",
	"inputs": {
		"input_global_trp": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "-4h@h,now",
				"token": "global_time"
			},
			"title": "Time Range",
			"type": "input.timerange"
		}
	},
	"defaults": {
		"dataSources": {
			"ds.search": {
				"options": {
					"queryParameters": {
						"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
						"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
					}
				}
			}
		}
	},
	"visualizations": {
		"viz_total_connections": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue",
			"title": "Total Inbound Connections",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_total_connections"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_unique_src_ips": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue",
			"title": "Unique Source IPs",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_unique_src_ips"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_non_akamai_hits": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue",
			"title": "⚠ Non-Akamai Connections",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_non_akamai_hits"
			},
			"options": {
				"majorColor": "> majorValue | rangeValue(majorColorEditorConfig)",
				"majorColorEditorConfig": [
					{
						"to": 1,
						"value": "#118832"
					},
					{
						"from": 1,
						"value": "#D41F1F"
					}
				]
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_top_src_ip": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue",
			"title": "Top Source IP",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_top_src_ip"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_timeline": {
			"type": "splunk.line",
			"title": "Connection Timeline",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_timeline"
			},
			"options": {
				"lineWidth": 2,
				"nullValueDisplay": "zero",
				"legendDisplay": "right",
				"legendMode": "standard",
				"xAxisTitleVisibility": "show",
				"yAxisTitleVisibility": "show",
				"yAxisAbbreviation": "auto",
				"yAxisScale": "linear",
				"dataValuesDisplay": "off",
				"showSplitSeries": false
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_src_ip_dist": {
			"type": "splunk.pie",
			"title": "Source IP Distribution",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_src_ip_dist"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_org_dist": {
			"type": "splunk.pie",
			"title": "Source Organization Distribution",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_org_dist"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_non_akamai_table": {
			"type": "splunk.table",
			"title": "⚠ Non-Akamai Connection Detail",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_non_akamai_table"
			},
			"options": {
				"count": 50,
				"drilldown": "none",
				"showRowNumbers": false,
				"headerVisibility": "fixed"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_detail_table": {
			"type": "splunk.table",
			"title": "All Connection Detail",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_detail_table"
			},
			"options": {
				"count": 100,
				"drilldown": "none",
				"showRowNumbers": false,
				"headerVisibility": "fixed"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		},
		"viz_site_dist": {
			"type": "splunk.pie",
			"title": "Site Distribution (site-a vs site-b)",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_site_dist_kpi"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"showLastUpdated": false
		}
	},
	"dataSources": {
		"ds_total_connections": {
			"name": "Total connections",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=firewall \"%ASA-6-302013\" (0.0.0.0 OR 0.0.0.0)\n| rex field=_raw \"%ASA-6-302013: Built inbound TCP connection \\d+ for outside:(?<src_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port>\\d+) \\((?<src_ip_nat>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port_nat>\\d+)\\) to \\S+:(?<dst_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<dst_port>\\d+) \\((?<nat_dst>[\\d.]+)/(?<nat_dst_port>\\d+)\\)\"\n| where isnotnull(src_ip) AND isnotnull(dst_ip)\n| head 10000\n| eval site = case(\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-a\",\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-b\",\n    1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| eval is_akamai = case(\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/8\",   src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/10\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/14\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",  src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\", src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/13\",  src_ip), 1,\n    1=1, 0)\n| eval src_type = if(is_akamai=1, \"Akamai\", \"Non-Akamai\")\n| stats count as \"Total Connections\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_unique_src_ips": {
			"name": "Unique source IPs",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=firewall \"%ASA-6-302013\" (0.0.0.0 OR 0.0.0.0)\n| rex field=_raw \"%ASA-6-302013: Built inbound TCP connection \\d+ for outside:(?<src_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port>\\d+) \\((?<src_ip_nat>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port_nat>\\d+)\\) to \\S+:(?<dst_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<dst_port>\\d+) \\((?<nat_dst>[\\d.]+)/(?<nat_dst_port>\\d+)\\)\"\n| where isnotnull(src_ip) AND isnotnull(dst_ip)\n| head 10000\n| eval site = case(\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-a\",\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-b\",\n    1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| eval is_akamai = case(\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/8\",   src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/10\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/14\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",  src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\", src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/13\",  src_ip), 1,\n    1=1, 0)\n| eval src_type = if(is_akamai=1, \"Akamai\", \"Non-Akamai\")\n| stats dc(src_ip) as \"Unique Source IPs\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_non_akamai_hits": {
			"name": "Non-Akamai connections",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=firewall \"%ASA-6-302013\" (0.0.0.0 OR 0.0.0.0)\n| rex field=_raw \"%ASA-6-302013: Built inbound TCP connection \\d+ for outside:(?<src_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port>\\d+) \\((?<src_ip_nat>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port_nat>\\d+)\\) to \\S+:(?<dst_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<dst_port>\\d+) \\((?<nat_dst>[\\d.]+)/(?<nat_dst_port>\\d+)\\)\"\n| where isnotnull(src_ip) AND isnotnull(dst_ip)\n| head 10000\n| eval site = case(\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-a\",\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-b\",\n    1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| eval is_akamai = case(\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/8\",   src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/10\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/14\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",  src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\", src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/13\",  src_ip), 1,\n    1=1, 0)\n| eval src_type = if(is_akamai=1, \"Akamai\", \"Non-Akamai\")\n| where is_akamai=0\n| stats count as \"Non-Akamai Connections\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_top_src_ip": {
			"name": "Top source IP",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=firewall \"%ASA-6-302013\" (0.0.0.0 OR 0.0.0.0)\n| rex field=_raw \"%ASA-6-302013: Built inbound TCP connection \\d+ for outside:(?<src_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port>\\d+) \\((?<src_ip_nat>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port_nat>\\d+)\\) to \\S+:(?<dst_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<dst_port>\\d+) \\((?<nat_dst>[\\d.]+)/(?<nat_dst_port>\\d+)\\)\"\n| where isnotnull(src_ip) AND isnotnull(dst_ip)\n| head 10000\n| eval site = case(\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-a\",\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-b\",\n    1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| eval is_akamai = case(\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/8\",   src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/10\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/14\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",  src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\", src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/13\",  src_ip), 1,\n    1=1, 0)\n| eval src_type = if(is_akamai=1, \"Akamai\", \"Non-Akamai\")\n| stats count by src_ip\n| sort - count\n| head 1\n| eval \"Top IP\" = src_ip . \" | \" . count\n| fields \"Top IP\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_timeline": {
			"name": "Connection timeline",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=firewall \"%ASA-6-302013\" (0.0.0.0 OR 0.0.0.0)\n| rex field=_raw \"%ASA-6-302013: Built inbound TCP connection \\d+ for outside:(?<src_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port>\\d+) \\((?<src_ip_nat>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port_nat>\\d+)\\) to \\S+:(?<dst_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<dst_port>\\d+) \\((?<nat_dst>[\\d.]+)/(?<nat_dst_port>\\d+)\\)\"\n| where isnotnull(src_ip) AND isnotnull(dst_ip)\n| head 10000\n| eval site = case(\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-a\",\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-b\",\n    1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| eval is_akamai = case(\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/8\",   src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/10\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/14\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",  src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\", src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/13\",  src_ip), 1,\n    1=1, 0)\n| eval src_type = if(is_akamai=1, \"Akamai\", \"Non-Akamai\")\n| timechart span=15m count by src_type",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_src_ip_dist": {
			"name": "Source IP distribution",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=firewall \"%ASA-6-302013\" (0.0.0.0 OR 0.0.0.0)\n| rex field=_raw \"%ASA-6-302013: Built inbound TCP connection \\d+ for outside:(?<src_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port>\\d+) \\((?<src_ip_nat>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port_nat>\\d+)\\) to \\S+:(?<dst_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<dst_port>\\d+) \\((?<nat_dst>[\\d.]+)/(?<nat_dst_port>\\d+)\\)\"\n| where isnotnull(src_ip) AND isnotnull(dst_ip)\n| head 10000\n| eval site = case(\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-a\",\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-b\",\n    1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| eval is_akamai = case(\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/8\",   src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/10\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/14\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",  src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\", src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/13\",  src_ip), 1,\n    1=1, 0)\n| eval src_type = if(is_akamai=1, \"Akamai\", \"Non-Akamai\")\n| stats count by src_ip\n| sort - count\n| head 20\n| rename src_ip as \"Source IP\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_org_dist": {
			"name": "Source organization distribution",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=firewall \"%ASA-6-302013\" (0.0.0.0 OR 0.0.0.0)\n| rex field=_raw \"%ASA-6-302013: Built inbound TCP connection \\d+ for outside:(?<src_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port>\\d+) \\((?<src_ip_nat>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port_nat>\\d+)\\) to \\S+:(?<dst_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<dst_port>\\d+) \\((?<nat_dst>[\\d.]+)/(?<nat_dst_port>\\d+)\\)\"\n| where isnotnull(src_ip) AND isnotnull(dst_ip)\n| head 10000\n| eval site = case(\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-a\",\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-b\",\n    1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| eval is_akamai = case(\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/8\",   src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/10\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/14\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",  src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\", src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/13\",  src_ip), 1,\n    1=1, 0)\n| eval src_type = if(is_akamai=1, \"Akamai\", \"Non-Akamai\")\n| stats count by src_type\n| sort - count\n| rename src_type as \"Type\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_non_akamai_table": {
			"name": "Non-Akamai connection detail",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=firewall \"%ASA-6-302013\" (0.0.0.0 OR 0.0.0.0)\n| rex field=_raw \"%ASA-6-302013: Built inbound TCP connection \\d+ for outside:(?<src_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port>\\d+) \\((?<src_ip_nat>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port_nat>\\d+)\\) to \\S+:(?<dst_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<dst_port>\\d+) \\((?<nat_dst>[\\d.]+)/(?<nat_dst_port>\\d+)\\)\"\n| where isnotnull(src_ip) AND isnotnull(dst_ip)\n| head 10000\n| eval site = case(\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-a\",\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-b\",\n    1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| eval is_akamai = case(\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/8\",   src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/10\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/14\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",  src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\", src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/13\",  src_ip), 1,\n    1=1, 0)\n| eval src_type = if(is_akamai=1, \"Akamai\", \"Non-Akamai\")\n| where is_akamai=0\n| eval time = strftime(_time, \"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\")\n| iplocation src_ip\n| eval country = coalesce(Country, \"Unknown\")\n| table time src_ip src_port site country nat_dst\n| sort - time\n| rename src_ip as \"Source IP\", src_port as \"Source Port\", site as Site, country as Country, nat_dst as \"NAT Dest\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_detail_table": {
			"name": "All connection detail",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=firewall \"%ASA-6-302013\" (0.0.0.0 OR 0.0.0.0)\n| rex field=_raw \"%ASA-6-302013: Built inbound TCP connection \\d+ for outside:(?<src_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port>\\d+) \\((?<src_ip_nat>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port_nat>\\d+)\\) to \\S+:(?<dst_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<dst_port>\\d+) \\((?<nat_dst>[\\d.]+)/(?<nat_dst_port>\\d+)\\)\"\n| where isnotnull(src_ip) AND isnotnull(dst_ip)\n| head 10000\n| eval site = case(\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-a\",\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-b\",\n    1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| eval is_akamai = case(\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/8\",   src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/10\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/14\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",  src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\", src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/13\",  src_ip), 1,\n    1=1, 0)\n| eval src_type = if(is_akamai=1, \"Akamai\", \"Non-Akamai\")\n| eval time = strftime(_time, \"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\")\n| table time src_ip src_port src_type site nat_dst\n| sort - time\n| rename src_ip as \"Source IP\", src_port as \"Source Port\", src_type as Type, site as Site, nat_dst as \"NAT Dest\"",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_site_dist_kpi": {
			"name": "Site distribution",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=firewall \"%ASA-6-302013\" (0.0.0.0 OR 0.0.0.0)\n| rex field=_raw \"%ASA-6-302013: Built inbound TCP connection \\d+ for outside:(?<src_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port>\\d+) \\((?<src_ip_nat>[\\d.]+)/(?<src_port_nat>\\d+)\\) to \\S+:(?<dst_ip>[\\d.]+)/(?<dst_port>\\d+) \\((?<nat_dst>[\\d.]+)/(?<nat_dst_port>\\d+)\\)\"\n| where isnotnull(src_ip) AND isnotnull(dst_ip)\n| head 10000\n| eval site = case(\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-a\",\n    dst_ip=\"0.0.0.0\", \"site-b\",\n    1=1, \"UNKNOWN\")\n| eval is_akamai = case(\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/8\",   src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/10\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/14\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",  src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\", src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/15\",src_ip), 1,\n    cidrmatch(\"0.0.0.0/13\",  src_ip), 1,\n    1=1, 0)\n| eval src_type = if(is_akamai=1, \"Akamai\", \"Non-Akamai\")\n| stats count by site\n| rename site as Site",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		}
	},
	"layout": {
		"globalInputs": [
			"input_global_trp"
		],
		"layoutDefinitions": {
			"layout_1": {
				"options": {
					"height": 1350,
					"width": 2100
				},
				"structure": [
					{
